mapper.select: SELECT ei.EVENT_ITEM_SEQ, ei.SALES_EVENT_SEQ, ei.ITEM_CD, i.ITEM_NM, i.SELL_PRICE AS ITEM_SELL_PRICE, ei.INQNTY, ei.SELL_PRICE, ei.USE_YN, ei.REG_DT, ei.UPDT_DT FROM TB_EVENT_ITEM ei JOIN TB_ITEM i ON i.ITEM_CD = ei.ITEM_CD WHERE ei.SALES_EVENT_SEQ = #{salesEventSeq} ORDER BY ei.ITEM_CD

SELECT ei.EVENT_ITEM_SEQ, ei.SALES_EVENT_SEQ, ei.ITEM_CD, i.ITEM_NM, i.SELL_PRICE AS ITEM_SELL_PRICE, ei.INQNTY, ei.SELL_PRICE, ei.USE_YN, ei.REG_DT, ei.UPDT_DT FROM TB_EVENT_ITEM ei JOIN TB_ITEM i ON i.ITEM_CD = ei.ITEM_CD WHERE ei.EVENT_ITEM_SEQ = #{eventItemSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_EVENT_ITEM SET INQNTY = #{inqnty}, SELL_PRICE = #{sellPrice}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPDT_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE EVENT_ITEM_SEQ = #{eventItemSeq}
